explanation: Present Perfect Tense digunakan untuk membicarakan tindakan atau keadaan yang dimulai di masa lalu dan masih berlanjut hingga sekarang, atau tindakan yang terjadi di masa lalu tetapi dampaknya masih terasa di masa sekarang.  Ini adalah tense yang penting dalam Bahasa Inggris dan sering muncul dalam soal IELTS.

examples: She has lived in Jakarta for five years.
They have not seen that movie before.
Have you ever been to Bali?

keyRules.description: 'For' digunakan untuk menyatakan durasi waktu (e.g., for two hours, for a week). 'Since' digunakan untuk menyatakan titik waktu dimulainya (e.g., since Monday, since 2010).
examples: We have known each other for ten years.
She has been a doctor since 2015.

keyRules.description: Kata-kata ini sering digunakan dengan Present Perfect.
examples: Has he finished his work yet?
I have never seen such a beautiful sunset.
The company has expanded its operations globally.
I have lost my keys, so I can't get into my house.
She has been studying English for three years.
They have lived in this city since they were children.
Have you ever visited a foreign country?
He hasn't called me back yet.
commonMistakes: Menggunakan Simple Past ketika Present Perfect lebih tepat, terutama ketika ada koneksi ke masa sekarang.
Lupa menggunakan 'have' atau 'has' sebelum past participle.
Menggunakan 'be' sebagai past participle (misalnya, 'I have be there' seharusnya 'I have been there').
ieltsTip: Dalam IELTS Writing Task 1, Present Perfect sangat berguna untuk mendeskripsikan tren atau perubahan yang dimulai di masa lalu dan terus berlanjut hingga periode yang ditunjukkan pada grafik atau tabel.  Misalnya, 'The number of tourists has increased significantly since 2000.' Dalam Speaking, gunakan Present Perfect untuk membicarakan pengalaman hidup Anda atau hal-hal yang telah Anda capai.

quiz.question: Fill in the blank with the correct form of the verb in Present Perfect:  They ______ (live) in London for five years.
Choose the correct sentence:
options: She has went to the store.
She has gone to the store.
quiz.answer: She has gone to the store.

quiz.question: Fill in the blank with 'for' or 'since':  I haven't seen him ______ last week.
Which word is a common adverb used with Present Perfect?
Complete the question: ______ you ever ______ (try) Indian food?
